name: Wound Healing (Scratch) Assay

components.name: 1. Seed cells in 6-well plate; grow to >95% confluency

note.en: Use 2–3×10⁵ cells/well for fast-growing lines (24 h); slower lines may need 48 h. Coat plate with Matrigel or fibronectin for weakly adherent cells.
note.zh: 快速增殖细胞（HeLa、MCF-7）每孔 2–3×10⁵，培养 24 h；缓慢增殖细胞可能需要 48 h。弱贴壁细胞可预包被 Matrigel 或纤连蛋白。

components.name: 2. Optional: pre-treat with Mitomycin C (10 µg/mL, 2 h, 37°C) to inhibit proliferation

note.en: Wash 3× PBS after MMC treatment. MMC isolates migration from proliferation. Omit if growth rate is low. Alternative: serum-free medium alone.
note.zh: MMC 处理后 PBS 洗 3 次。MMC 将迁移与增殖分离。生长缓慢的细胞可省略。替代方案：仅用无血清培养基。

components.name: 3. Create scratch with 200 µL pipette tip held perpendicular to plate

note.en: Drag tip firmly in one straight line. Use ruler as guide for consistent width. Mark bottom of plate with pen perpendicular to scratch for consistent imaging position.
note.zh: 垂直持枪头，用力划直线。用直尺保证一致宽度。在划痕垂直方向用记号笔标记培养皿底部，确保每次拍摄位置一致。

note.en: Gentle wash to remove detached cells and debris without disturbing wound edge.
note.zh: 轻柔冲洗，去除脱落细胞和碎片，避免扰动划痕边缘。

components.name: 5. Add serum-free (or low-serum, 0.5–1% FBS) medium ± treatments

note.en: Vehicle/DMSO controls must be at same concentration as treatment. For cytokines/growth factors: add to serum-free medium.
note.zh: 溶剂/DMSO 对照需与处理组等浓度。细胞因子/生长因子加入无血清培养基中。

components.name: 6. Image at 0 h immediately (4× or 10× objective, phase contrast)

note.en: Take 3–5 images per well at marked positions. Record stage coordinates (automated microscopes). ImageXpress/EVOS/Operetta all suitable.
note.zh: 在标记位置每孔拍 3–5 张图。记录载物台坐标（自动显微镜）。ImageXpress/EVOS/Operetta 均适用。

components.name: 7. Image at regular intervals: 6 h, 12 h, 24 h, 48 h

note.en: Frequency depends on cell migration speed. Fast migrators (MDA-MB-231): 6–12 h endpoint. Slow (primary cells): 24–48 h. Keep cells at 37°C during imaging if possible (live cell imager).
note.zh: 频率取决于细胞迁移速度。快速迁移细胞（MDA-MB-231）：6–12 h 终点。缓慢（原代细胞）：24–48 h。可能时保持 37°C 拍摄（活细胞成像系统）。

components.name: 8. Quantify: measure wound area with ImageJ (MRI Wound Healing Tool plugin)

note.en: % Wound Closure = (Area₀ₕ − Areaₜₕ) / Area₀ₕ × 100. Or measure wound width manually (5 positions/image). Report as % closure or migration distance (µm/h).
note.zh: % 愈合 = (面积₀ₕ − 面积ₜₕ) / 面积₀ₕ × 100。或手动测量 5 个位置的划痕宽度。报告愈合百分比或迁移距离（µm/h）。

notes.en: Controls: (1) untreated cells (baseline), (2) no-serum negative control, (3) MMC-treated + serum (pure migration). Triplicate wells per condition. For 3D migration: transwell_migration (Boyden chamber). Limitations: does not distinguish migration vs proliferation without MMC treatment.
notes.zh: 对照：(1) 未处理细胞（基线）；(2) 无血清阴性对照；(3) MMC 处理 + 血清（纯迁移）。每组 3 个平行孔。3D 迁移实验参见 transwell_migration（Boyden 小室）。局限性：未用 MMC 时无法区分迁移与增殖。

ref: Liang et al. (2007) Nat Protoc 2:329–333; Jonkman et al. (2014) J Biomech 47:9–13; Zordan et al. (2011) J Immunol Methods 370:56

materials.name: Cells at 100% confluency in 6- or 12-well plates
Ruler or reference mark on plate

briefSteps.en: Seed cells → grow to >95% confluency → optional Mitomycin C treatment (10 µg/mL, 2 h) → scratch with 200 µL tip → wash 2× PBS → add serum-free medium ± treatment → image at 0 h → image at 6/12/24/48 h → quantify wound closure % with ImageJ
briefSteps.zh: 铺细胞 → 生长至 >95% 汇合 → 可选丝裂霉素 C 处理（10 µg/mL，2 h）→ 200 µL 枪头划痕 → PBS 洗 2 次 → 加无血清培养基 ± 处理 → 0 h 拍照 → 6/12/24/48 h 拍照 → ImageJ 定量划痕愈合百分比

detailedSteps.en: Seed 2–3×10⁵ cells per well in a 6-well plate in 2 mL complete medium; for weakly adherent cells, pre-coat wells with fibronectin (5 µg/mL, 30 min RT) or Matrigel before seeding.
detailedSteps.zh: 每孔铺 2–3×10⁵ 个细胞（6 孔板，2 mL 完全培养基）；对弱贴壁细胞，铺板前用纤连蛋白（5 µg/mL，室温 30 min）或 Matrigel 预包被孔板。

detailedSteps.en: Grow to >95% confluency at 37°C, 5% CO₂ (typically 24–48 h depending on cell line).
detailedSteps.zh: 37°C、5% CO₂ 培养至 >95% 汇合度（通常 24–48 h，取决于细胞系）。
实验日 – 划痕与处理

detailedSteps.en: Optional proliferation inhibition: replace medium with complete medium containing Mitomycin C (10 µg/mL) and incubate at 37°C for 2 h; wash 3× with PBS to remove MMC; this step isolates migration from proliferation.
detailedSteps.zh: 可选增殖抑制步骤：换液至含丝裂霉素 C（10 µg/mL）的完全培养基，37°C 孵育 2 h；用 PBS 洗 3 次去除 MMC；此步将迁移与增殖分离。

detailedSteps.en: Create a straight scratch: hold a sterile 200 µL pipette tip perpendicular to the plate surface; drag firmly across the well in a single straight line using a ruler as a guide; mark the outside bottom of the plate perpendicularly to the scratch for consistent reimaging.
detailedSteps.zh: 制作直线划痕：将无菌 200 µL 枪头垂直置于孔板表面；以直尺为参照用力在孔内直线划过；在孔板外底部垂直于划痕方向画记号线，确保重复成像位置一致。

detailedSteps.en: Wash wells gently twice with PBS to remove detached cells and debris without disturbing the wound edges.
detailedSteps.zh: 用 PBS 轻柔洗涤两次，去除脱落细胞和碎片，避免扰动划痕边缘。

detailedSteps.en: Add 2 mL serum-free medium (or 0.5–1% FBS) ± test compounds; include untreated and solvent controls at matching DMSO concentration.
detailedSteps.zh: 每孔加 2 mL 无血清培养基（或 0.5–1% FBS）± 受试化合物；设未处理对照及与处理组等浓度 DMSO 的溶剂对照。

detailedSteps.en: Immediately image at 0 h: capture 3–5 images per well at the marked positions using 4× or 10× phase-contrast objective; record stage coordinates if using an automated microscope.
detailedSteps.zh: 立即进行 0 h 拍照：在标记位置用 4× 或 10× 相差物镜每孔拍 3–5 张图；使用自动显微镜时记录载物台坐标。

detailedSteps.en: Return plate to incubator; image at subsequent timepoints (6 h, 12 h, 24 h, 48 h) at exactly the same positions; endpoint depends on migration speed — fast lines (MDA-MB-231): 6–12 h; slow lines/primary cells: 24–48 h.
detailedSteps.zh: 将培养板放回培养箱；在完全相同位置依次拍摄后续时间点（6 h、12 h、24 h、48 h）；终点取决于迁移速度——快速细胞（MDA-MB-231）：6–12 h；缓慢细胞/原代细胞：24–48 h。

detailedSteps.en: Quantify wound closure using ImageJ (MRI Wound Healing Tool plugin): % Wound Closure = (Area₀ₕ − Areaₜₕ) / Area₀ₕ × 100; alternatively measure wound width at 5 positions per image and report migration distance (µm/h).
detailedSteps.zh: 用 ImageJ（MRI 划痕愈合插件）定量：% 愈合 = (面积₀ₕ − 面积ₜₕ) / 面积₀ₕ × 100；也可每张图手动测量 5 个位置的划痕宽度，报告迁移距离（µm/h）。

note.en: Cells grow to >95% confluency overnight (24–48 h); proceed when ready
note.zh: 细胞过夜生长至 >95% 汇合度（24–48 h）；准备好后继续

note.en: After 0 h imaging, plate returns to incubator; next imaging at 6–12 h is an overnight stopping point for slow-migrating cells
note.zh: 0 h 拍照后放回培养箱；迁移慢的细胞可在 6–12 h 成像间隔过夜

usage.en: Measure cell migration by wound healing (scratch) assay.
usage.zh: 划痕实验（wound healing）检测细胞迁移能力。
